title: 60L Laundry Basket with Lid - Large Plastic Washing Basket with Handles - Heavy-Duty Rattan Laundry Bin Hamper Clothes Storage Organiser for Bedroom & Bathroom - Grey, 60 Litre
features: 60L LAUNDRY BASKET WITH LID & HANDLES: This stylish and practical 60 litre laundry basket with fitted lid & carry handles provides convenience and functionality, allowing you to transport your laundry securely and easily.
LARGE CAPACITY: With a generous 60 litre capacity, this lightweight laundry basket offers ample room for storing and transporting large loads of laundry, making it ideal for busy households.

WOVEN RATTAN STYLE: Featuring a woven rattan effect with ventilation holes, this laundry bin prevents smells & mould, while bringing a touch of natural charm to your laundry area, elevating its aesthetic appeal.

HEAVY-DUTY & EASY CLEAN: Made from hard-wearing PP plastic, this laundry basket is built to withstand the rigors of everyday use, ensuring long-lasting durability and reliability. The smooth surface of the PP plastic makes it easy to clean.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL: This sturdy laundry hamper is available in a choice of white or grey, and is ideal for use as a laundry bin, washing basket or clothes storage & organiser in the bathroom, bedroom and utility.
SPECIFICATION: Dimensions: 57cm (H) x 44cm (W) x 35cm (L) | Capacity: 60 Litres | Material: Woven Plastic | Colour: Grey or White
description: 60 Litre Plastic Laundry Basket with Lid & Handles by Daniel James Housewares Upgrade your laundry routine with our 60 Litre Woven Rattan Laundry Basket, a stylish and practical solution for keeping your laundry area tidy and organized. This laundry basket offers ample capacity while also being compact enough to fit into tight spaces. Featuring a fitted lid and two side carry handles with a curved lid design, this 60 litre laundry hamper accommodates large loads of laundry with ease. Crafted from hard-wearing and easy-to-clean PP plastic, this laundry basket is designed to withstand daily use while maintaining its sleek appearance. With its durable construction, stylish design, and convenient features, this basket makes laundry day a breeze. Choose from classic grey or pristine white to complement your home décor and personal style, ensuring a seamless integration into any space. Spacious Capacity : With a generous 60 litre capacity, this laundry basket offers ample room for storing and transporting large loads of laundry, making it ideal for busy households. Convenient Lid and Handles : Equipped with a fitted lid and two side carry handles, this laundry basket provides convenience and functionality, allowing you to transport your laundry securely and easily. Rattan Woven Effect : Featuring a woven rattan effect design, this laundry basket brings a touch of natural charm to your laundry area, elevating its aesthetic appeal. Easy to Clean : The smooth surface of the PP plastic makes it easy to clean with just a damp cloth, allowing for effortless maintenance and upkeep. Dimensions : 57cm (H) x 44cm (W) x 35 (L)cm Capacity : 60 Litres Material : Hard Wearing Woven Plastic
